artifact.source:
root = Card([header, chart], "Error Rate Over Time", "ERROR log lines per 10-minute bucket")
header = Stack([title, subtitle], "vertical", "sm")
title = Heading("app.log — ERROR rate", "h3")
subtitle = Text("Bucketed in 10-minute windows from 09:00 to 09:50", "muted")
errorData = Query("log_series", {file: "./logs/app.log", groupBy: "10m", match: "ERROR", metric: "count"}, {data: [], x: "bucket", y: "count"})
chart = Chart("bar", errorData.data, errorData.x, errorData.y, "ERROR lines per 10-minute bucket", 360)

toolInput.title: Chart the error rate over time from a log file on disk
toolInput.markup:
root = Card([header, chart], "Error Rate Over Time", "ERROR log lines per 10-minute bucket")
header = Stack([title, subtitle], "vertical", "sm")
title = Heading("app.log — ERROR rate", "h3")
subtitle = Text("Bucketed in 10-minute windows from 09:00 to 09:50", "muted")
errorData = Query("log_series", {file: "./logs/app.log", groupBy: "10m", match: "ERROR", metric: "count"}, {data: [], x: "bucket", y: "count"})
chart = Chart("bar", errorData.data, errorData.x, errorData.y, "ERROR lines per 10-minute bucket", 360)

failureReasons: content-non-empty: expected >=200 visible chars and >=120px of painted content, observed 178 chars and 876px — "Error Rate Over Time ERROR log lines per 10-minute bucket app.log — ERROR rate Bucketed in 10-minute windows from 09:00 to 09:50 ERROR lines per 10-minute bucke..."

artifact.source:
root = Card([header, summary, chart], "Error Rate Over Time", "ERROR log lines per 10-minute bucket")
header = Stack([title, subtitle], "vertical", "sm")
title = Heading("app.log — ERROR rate", "h3")
subtitle = Text("Bucketed in 10-minute windows from 09:00 to 09:50", "muted")
errorData = Query("log_series", {file: "./logs/app.log", groupBy: "10m", match: "ERROR"}, defaultData)
defaultData = {data: defaultRows, x: "bucket", y: "errors"}
defaultRows = [{bucket: "09:00", errors: 0}, {bucket: "09:10", errors: 1}, {bucket: "09:20", errors: 5}, {bucket: "09:30", errors: 11}, {bucket: "09:40", errors: 4}, {bucket: "09:50", errors: 1}]
totalMetric = Metric("Total ERROR lines", "22", null, null, "danger")
peakMetric = Metric("Peak 10-min bucket", "09:30", null, null, "warning")
summary = Stack([totalMetric, peakMetric], "horizontal", "lg")
chart = Chart("bar", errorData.data, errorData.x, errorData.y, "ERROR lines per 10-minute bucket", 360)

toolInput.title: Chart the error rate over time from a log file on disk
toolInput.markup:
root = Card([header, summary, chart], "Error Rate Over Time", "ERROR log lines per 10-minute bucket")
header = Stack([title, subtitle], "vertical", "sm")
title = Heading("app.log — ERROR rate", "h3")
subtitle = Text("Bucketed in 10-minute windows from 09:00 to 09:50", "muted")
errorData = Query("log_series", {file: "./logs/app.log", groupBy: "10m", match: "ERROR"}, defaultData)
defaultData = {data: defaultRows, x: "bucket", y: "errors"}
defaultRows = [{bucket: "09:00", errors: 0}, {bucket: "09:10", errors: 1}, {bucket: "09:20", errors: 5}, {bucket: "09:30", errors: 11}, {bucket: "09:40", errors: 4}, {bucket: "09:50", errors: 1}]
totalMetric = Metric("Total ERROR lines", "22", null, null, "danger")
peakMetric = Metric("Peak 10-min bucket", "09:30", null, null, "warning")
summary = Stack([totalMetric, peakMetric], "horizontal", "lg")
chart = Chart("bar", errorData.data, errorData.x, errorData.y, "ERROR lines per 10-minute bucket", 360)
